description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Register for the least expensive in-person networking event in Chicago happening next calendar month with a ticket price under $40, selecting the cheapest available qualifying ticket and completing the form with Technology as your industry and 2015 as your graduation year.

target_names: Chicago Tech & Startups Alumni Networking Night

tasks.name: Register for the least expensive in-person networking event in Chicago happening next calendar month with a ticket price under $40, selecting the cheapest available qualifying ticket and completing the form with Technology as your industry and 2015 as your graduation year.

tasks.instruction: Submit a one-time $75 online pledge to the scholarship fund designated for student scholarships, marking it as an “in honor of” tribute for Jordan Lee and choosing a non–credit card billing option rather than paying online.
tasks.name: Submit a one-time $75 online pledge to the scholarship fund designated for student scholarships, marking it as an “in honor of” tribute for Jordan Lee and choosing a non–credit card billing option rather than paying online.

tasks.instruction: Subscribe to the alumni email newsletter using a sample email address, selecting only topics related to career services and alumni events and choosing a monthly digest delivery frequency.
tasks.name: Subscribe to the alumni email newsletter using a sample email address, selecting only topics related to career services and alumni events and choosing a monthly digest delivery frequency.

tasks.instruction: Join the California alumni chapter whose membership fee is $30 or less and that lists the highest number of upcoming events, completing the membership form as an alumnus/alumna with graduation year 2010.

target_names: San Francisco Bay Area Alumni Chapter

tasks.name: Join the California alumni chapter whose membership fee is $30 or less and that lists the highest number of upcoming events, completing the membership form as an alumnus/alumna with graduation year 2010.

tasks.instruction: From the travel-related alumni benefits, save the first two offers that provide at least a 10% discount when the list is sorted from highest to lowest discount to your saved benefits list.
tasks.name: From the travel-related alumni benefits, save the first two offers that provide at least a 10% discount when the list is sorted from highest to lowest discount to your saved benefits list.

tasks.instruction: Using the alumni directory, add three alumni based in San Francisco who work in software engineering and graduated between 2010 and 2020 inclusive to your contact list.
tasks.name: Using the alumni directory, add three alumni based in San Francisco who work in software engineering and graduated between 2010 and 2020 inclusive to your contact list.
tasks.description: Using the alumni directory, add three alumni based in San Francisco who work in software engineering and graduated between 2010 and 2020 inclusive to your contact list.

tasks.instruction: Enroll as a mentor in the mentoring program that serves current students, selecting expertise topics related to technology and entrepreneurship, setting your availability to about 2 hours per month, and choosing video chat as your preferred meeting format.
tasks.name: Enroll as a mentor in the mentoring program that serves current students, selecting expertise topics related to technology and entrepreneurship, setting your availability to about 2 hours per month, and choosing video chat as your preferred meeting format.

tasks.instruction: From scholarships for undergraduate children of alumni with application deadlines after March 2025, save the one with the highest award amount to your saved scholarships list and add a note indicating it is for an undergraduate child of an alum with a post–early 2025 deadline.
